title: cyclosorus canlaonensis
intro: Cyclosorus canlaonensis, also known as the Canlaon sword fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. It is a medicinal plant used in traditional medicine, particularly in the Philippines, to treat various health conditions. The plant is said to possess antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, making it beneficial for treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues. Cyclosorus canlaonensis can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, or used in traditional medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
